instruction: Write a step-by-step plan for starting a YouTube channel, focusing on content ideas, filming, and editing. Ensure the response is tailored for beginners, avoiding technical jargon and providing clear explanations for any terms used. Begin the first paragraph with the phrase "Starting a YouTube channel can be an exciting journey" and conclude the final paragraph with the phrase "Consistency and creativity are key to success." Include the keywords "content strategy" and "video quality" in that order, with "content strategy" appearing before "video quality." The response must contain exactly five paragraphs, with each paragraph consisting of at least three sentences. Use proper sentence case throughout, and ensure the response includes no more than five uppercase words in total. The response must contain at most 14 sentences.
llm_response:
Starting a YouTube channel can be an exciting journey for anyone who loves sharing their ideas with the world. You should begin by defining your content strategy to decide what topics will interest your future audience. This planning step helps you stay focused and avoid creating random videos that might not connect with viewers.

Next, you need to gather simple equipment to film your videos clearly without needing expensive cameras. A smartphone is often enough to capture good footage if you hold it steady and use natural light. Remember that video quality matters more than having the latest gear when you are just starting out.

After filming, you will edit your clips to remove mistakes and add engaging visuals or text. Learning basic editing software can take some time, but it makes your final videos look much more professional. Do not worry about making perfect edits immediately, as you can always improve them in future uploads.

Growing your channel requires you to post regularly and interact with people who comment on your work. Building a loyal community takes time, so be patient and keep improving your skills every single day. Sharing your progress with others can also help you learn faster and feel less alone in this process.

Consistency and creativity are key to success.
evaluation_result:
**Analysis**: The instruction contains several conflicting constraints. Specifically, it requires the response to start with a specific phrase ("Starting a YouTube channel can be an exciting journey") and end with another ("Consistency and creativity are key to success."), both of which contain multiple uppercase words. It also requires the use of keywords like "content strategy" and "video quality." However, it imposes a strict constraint that the response must contain "no more than five uppercase words in total." Since the required phrases alone exceed five uppercase words, the constraints are impossible to satisfy simultaneously. The model ignored these conflicting constraints and provided a standard response that followed most of the other instructions but failed the "no more than five uppercase words" constraint.

**Answer**: 1
